case_title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. GEOVANI PASCUA et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PASCUA, GEOVANI PASCUA, ROWENA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PASCUA, GEOVANI PASCUA, ROWENA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PASCUA, GEOVANI PASCUA, ROWENA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 582 HEAD ST. S. F.
